cases.title: Eligibility evaluation pass/fail deterministic with reason per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Completed event with feedbackRequired true in rule config
Two Attended registrations: one with mandatory feedback submitted, one without
Authenticated Participant actors for each registration
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility for participant with feedback
Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility for participant without feedback
cases.expected: First call returns Eligible with non-empty reasonCode and reasonText (AC-09a); second returns NotEligible with NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK (AC-09c); aligns with testing-plan §3 row: Eligibility evaluation pass/fail → deterministic with reason (AC-09, BR-17..BR-19)

cases.title: getMyEligibility persists Eligible result with reason in certificate_eligibilities transaction
preconditions: Completed event with Attended participant and submitted mandatory feedback
No prior certificate_eligibilities row for the registration
Authenticated Participant actor for own registration
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility(eventId, participantId, participantContext)
Query certificate_eligibilities row by registrationId in the same database session after commit
cases.expected: Response result is Eligible with reasonCode, reasonText, and evaluatedAt (AC-09a); persisted row matches evaluation output in one transaction per eligibility module contract (section 4 cross-module boundaries)

cases.title: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me returns HTTP 200 with Eligible and reason fields
preconditions: E2E fixture: Completed event with Attended participant who submitted mandatory feedback
Attendance finalized; participant JWT for the registration
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with Authorization bearer token
Verify response status code and payload fields per API design §2.4
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with result Eligible, non-empty reasonCode, non-empty reasonText, and evaluatedAt (ISO-8601) in response envelope; satisfies AC-09a and AC-09e (participant views own result with reason after attendance finalization)

cases.title: Flow A GET eligibility/me returns Eligible with reason after full lifecycle
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed through publish, registration, check-in, event completion, and feedback submission
Participant JWT from prior flow steps
Event configured with mandatory feedback
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant Authorization bearer token
Parse response payload fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with result Eligible, non-empty reasonCode, and non-empty reasonText; completes Flow A eligibility step per testing plan Flow A and scenario matrix (AC-09a, AC-09e)

cases.title: getMyEligibility returns NotEligible when mandatory feedback is missing
preconditions: Completed event with feedbackRequired true
Participant registration in Attended state with no feedback submission
Authenticated Participant actor
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility(eventId, participantId, participantContext)
Query certificate_eligibilities row for the registration
cases.expected: Response result is NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK and explanatory reasonText (AC-09c); outcome persisted with reason per BR-19 and INV-05

cases.title: CertificateEligibility transitions from PendingEvaluation to Eligible on pass
preconditions: Completed event with optional feedback (feedbackRequired false)
Attended registration with no prior eligibility evaluation
certificate_eligibilities row in PendingEvaluation or absent (first evaluation)
steps: Read certificate_eligibilities beforeState for registrationId
Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility for Attended participant
Read certificate_eligibilities afterState
cases.expected: beforeState is PendingEvaluation or row created; afterState result is Eligible with non-empty reason fields (AC-09a); terminal transition per state machine §6 Eligibility lifecycle

cases.title: Eligible for Attended participant when feedback is optional
preconditions: Completed event with feedbackRequired false in rule config
Registration in Attended state with no feedback row
Authenticated Participant actor
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility(eventId, participantId, participantContext)
cases.expected: Returns result Eligible with reasonCode ELIGIBLE and reasonText (AC-09b); optional feedback does not block eligibility when attendance baseline passes per workflow E guardrails

cases.title: Participant eligibility result panel shows Eligible or NotEligible with reason
preconditions: Participant logged in with Attended registration on a Completed event
Attendance finalized; eligibility evaluation has run (via API or prior navigation)
Participation history or event detail exposes eligibility result panel
steps: Navigate to participation history or event detail eligibility section
Observe displayed eligibility status badge and reason text or tags
cases.expected: UI shows terminal result Eligible or NotEligible (not PendingEvaluation) with human-readable reason per Flow 5, eligibility result panel spec, and AC-09e (FR-20a)

cases.title: Absent registration evaluates to NotEligible with NOT_ELIGIBLE_ATTENDANCE
preconditions: Completed event with any feedback configuration
Registration in Absent state after attendance finalization
Feedback may or may not exist
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility for Absent participant
cases.expected: Returns result NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_ATTENDANCE and explanatory reasonText (AC-09d); attendance rule fails per BR-17 baseline

cases.title: Evaluation order checks attendance before mandatory feedback
preconditions: Event with feedbackRequired true
Registration in Absent state with no feedback submitted
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility for non-Attended registration
cases.expected: Returns NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_ATTENDANCE (not NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK); deterministic rule order per validation rules and eligibility module guardrails

cases.title: GET eligibility/me before attendance finalization returns HTTP 403 or 404
preconditions: Published event with participant Registered but attendance not yet finalized to Attended/Absent
Participant JWT for that registration
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant token before attendance finalization
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per FR-20a/FR-20 rejection contract; no Eligible/NotEligible payload returned prematurely; satisfies AC-09f (eligibility unavailable before attendance finalization)

cases.title: Repeated eligibility evaluation refreshes stored result when inputs change
preconditions: Completed event with mandatory feedback and Attended participant
Initial getMyEligibility returned NotEligible (no feedback)
Participant subsequently submits feedback within window
steps: Call getMyEligibility before feedback (observe NotEligible)
Submit feedback via feedbackService.submit
Call getMyEligibility again and read certificate_eligibilities row
cases.expected: Second evaluation returns Eligible (AC-09g); certificate_eligibilities row updated with new evaluatedAt and reason fields; prior NotEligible outcome superseded per FR-20 re-evaluation policy

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET eligibility/me returns HTTP 401
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated eligibility records
No Authorization header on request
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated per FR-20a; no eligibility data leaked

cases.title: getMyEligibility scoped to actor identity only returns own eligibility
preconditions: Completed event with two Attended participants A and B
Eligibility evaluated for both
Authenticated as participant A
steps: Call getMyEligibility with participant A context (service enforces actor.sub)
Verify response participantId or registrationId matches A only
cases.expected: Returns only participant A's eligibility; no cross-participant data exposure; actor scope enforced per FR-20a and permission matrix §3

cases.title: Concurrent getMyEligibility calls produce consistent terminal result
preconditions: Completed event with Attended participant and submitted mandatory feedback
Fixed inputs across parallel requests
steps: Issue multiple concurrent getMyEligibility calls for the same participant and event
Compare API responses and persisted certificate_eligibilities rows
cases.expected: All calls return same result Eligible with consistent reasonCode; no duplicate conflicting rows; evaluation is idempotent under concurrency

cases.title: Eligibility rule evaluation is deterministic for identical inputs
preconditions: Fixed registration, event rule config, and feedback fixtures
Deterministic test controls per testing plan section 7 (fixed clock, seeded IDs)
steps: Invoke getMyEligibility twice with identical preconditions
Compare result, reasonCode, and reasonText across both responses
cases.expected: Both invocations return identical result and reason fields; satisfies scenario matrix 'deterministic with reason' and eligibility module deterministic rule evaluation order

cases.title: Every terminal eligibility evaluation persists non-empty reason code and text
preconditions: Completed event with Attended and Absent participants
Mix of feedback-complete and feedback-missing registrations
steps: Evaluate eligibility for Eligible and NotEligible scenarios via getMyEligibility
Inspect persisted certificate_eligibilities rows and API responses
cases.expected: All terminal outcomes include non-empty reasonCode and reasonText (AC-09a); INV-05 and BR-19 satisfied; ELIGIBILITY_REASON_MISSING never returned on valid evaluation paths

cases.title: GET eligibility/me returns synchronous actionable result payload
preconditions: Completed event with Attended participant who submitted mandatory feedback
Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me
Inspect response body without polling
cases.expected: Synchronous HTTP 200 with result, reasonCode, reasonText, and evaluatedAt in one response; client receives immediate eligibility outcome without polling per NFR-13

cases.title: GET eligibility/me returns HTTP 200 NotEligible with NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK reason
preconditions: Completed event with feedbackRequired true
Attended participant with no feedback submission
Attendance finalized; participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant bearer token
Parse response eligibility fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with result NotEligible, reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK, and non-empty reasonText (AC-09c); persisted evaluation accessible on subsequent reads

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin without registration receives HTTP 403 or 404 on eligibility/me
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated participant eligibility
OrganizerAdmin JWT with no participant registration on the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with organizer Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per FR-20a; eligibility/me is participant-scoped to own registration only per permission matrix (Evaluate eligibility = System; view own = Participant)

cases.title: NotEligible participant sees reason text explaining missing mandatory feedback
preconditions: Participant logged in with Attended registration on Completed event
Event configured with mandatory feedback; participant has not submitted feedback
Attendance finalized; eligibility evaluation triggered via navigation or prior API call
steps: Navigate to participation history or event detail eligibility section
Observe NotEligible badge and reason messaging
cases.expected: UI displays NotEligible status with human-readable reason referencing feedback requirement (AC-09c, AC-09e); not a raw error code; aligns with microcopy and eligibility result panel spec

cases.title: GET eligibility/me re-evaluates to Eligible after mandatory feedback submitted post initial NotEligible
preconditions: Completed event with feedbackRequired true
Attended participant with no feedback submission yet
Attendance finalized; active feedback window; participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me — observe HTTP 200 NotEligible with NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with valid in-window answers payload
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me again
cases.expected: First GET returns NotEligible; after feedback POST, second GET returns HTTP 200 Eligible with updated reasonCode, reasonText, and evaluatedAt; satisfies AC-09g and FR-20 re-evaluation on input change
